summary: Ralph Iteration 4: Major UX Enhancements - Implemented dark mode support (PRD feature) with CSS variables and theme toggle, added location name search functionality for better discoverability (PRD requirement), improved accessibility with search ARIA labels. All P0/P1 features complete and maintained. Build passes with no errors. Code organization from previous iteration (80% App.tsx reduction) remains intact.
improvements: Implemented dark mode theme with softer grays/blues per PRD spec
Added dark mode toggle button to header (Moon/Sun icon)
Added localStorage persistence for dark mode preference
Implemented location name search functionality across Chinese/English names
Search filters by both location names and addresses for better discovery
Real-time search filtering with improved UX
Added proper ARIA labels for accessibility
Maintained all existing functionality and features
CSS variables properly support theme switching

test_summary.feature_coverage: All P0/P1 features complete + search enhancement
